title: olea europaea subsp. sativa
intro: Olea europaea subsp. sativa, commonly known as olive tree, is a subspecies of the olive tree (Olea europaea) native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of olive tree leaves and fruits have been widely recognized for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of olive tree include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and providing relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Olive tree leaves and fruits are often used in herbal preparations such as tea, oil, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness their medicinal properties.
